title: Blechnum fernandezianum

taxonomy: Blechnum fernandezianum is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. This species belongs to the genus Blechnum, which includes several species of terrestrial ferns. The Blechnaceae family is a part of the fern order Polypodiales. Blechnum fernandezianum is native to Chile and Argentina, and is found in humid, shaded areas. It is an epiphytic or terrestrial fern with distinctive fronds.
